ogTitle: Weengallon vs Weipa Airport: Climate Safety

heading: Weengallon vs Weipa Airport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weengallon, Queensland and Weipa Airport, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Weengallon (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weengallon or Weipa Airport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weengallon has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Weipa Airport scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weengallon scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Weipa Airport scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weengallon or Weipa Airport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
